title: euphrasia officinalis f. subeglandulosa
intro: Euphrasia officinalis f. subeglandulosa, also known as a subspecies of the eye-bright plant, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Euphrasia officinalis f. subeglandulosa include its potential to soothe eye irritations, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of this plant, such as tinctures and infusions, can be used to support eye health and alleviate symptoms of dry eyes, conjunctivitis, and other eye-related conditions.
